# gsm_environment_autoscaling_group (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `autoscaling_group_name` (String) Name of the autoscaling group
- `environment_id` (String) Environment ID where the autoscaling group belongs

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the autoscaling group
- `targets` (Block List) Autoscaling targets configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--targets))
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `annotations` (Map of String) Annotations for the autoscaling group (read-only: UpdateMetadata auth wrapper not implemented on GSM server)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--targets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `targets`

Required:

- `cluster_name` (String) Cluster name
- `weight` (Number) Weight for this cluster in autoscaling distribution

Optional:

- `max_pods` (Number) Maximum number of game server pods that can be deployed to this cluster


<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `default` (String)
